description_long: This is a round, beige ceramic plate featuring a gourmet dish artfully arranged on top. The main food item appears to be a grilled octopus tentacle, garnished with slices of garlic and accompanied by leafy greens and a wedge of lemon. The plate has a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a shallow, gently sloping rim. The food presentation is colorful, with the reddish-brown octopus, green vegetables, and yellow lemon providing visual contrast. The plate is clean and free of visible chips or cracks, suggesting it is in excellent condition.
description: A beige ceramic plate with a gourmet octopus dish, garnished with greens and lemon, presented in a clean and pristine state.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from the front, showcasing the octopus tentacle and greens as the central focus, with the lemon wedge partially visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the lemon wedge and greens more prominently, with the octopus tentacle slightly turned away.
description_view_2: The plate is viewed from the back, with the lemon wedge and greens in the foreground and the octopus tentacle receding.
description_view_3: The octopus tentacle is most prominent in this view, curling toward the viewer, with greens and lemon less visible.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is shown with food arranged on top, implying placement on a dining surface.
